steps.t: Faramir and his men may be found within the Osgiliath Culverts beneath the city, if they still stand against the armies of the enemy.
Damrod and the few Gondorian soldiers that still defend Osgiliath can be found among the culverts beneath the city.
Orcs can be found throughout Osgiliath, and Damrod hopes that you might find Faramir or soldiers with news of him in the south-western area of the cit…
Inthol told you that he last saw Faramir and Gelnor racing to the north-west area of Osgiliath, pursued by a frightful commander of the enemy forces n…
Gelnor saw an Orc runner crushed beneath falling stones near a fountain to the east, and he wants you to dig through the rubble in search of the messa…
Gelnor saw an Orc runner crushed beneath falling stones near a fountain to the east, and he wants you to dig through the rubble in search of the messa…
You have recovered one of the messages sent by Gothmog to his forces in Osgiliath, and should bring it to Damrod among the culverts beneath the city.
